name: Half-Orc
summary: Strong and intimidating outsiders. Carry orcish ferocity in human society.

traits.name: Orc Ferocity
traits.summary: Once per day, when reduced below 0 HP but not killed, can fight on for one round before falling unconscious.

traits.name: Orc Blood
traits.summary: Counts as both human and orc for race-based effects.

traits.name: Weapon Familiarity
traits.summary: Proficient with greataxe and falchion; treat any weapon with 'orc' in its name as martial.
